mapper.select: SELECT request.REQUEST_NO, request.INSERT_DT AS requestDt, detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD AS requestUserCd, FN_GET_USER_FULL_NM(detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS requestUserNm, FN_GET_USER_FULL_NM(approvalInfo.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS approvalUser, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(request.USE_START_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useStartYmd, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(request.USE_END_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS useEndYmd, COALESCE(request.WATERMARK_YN, 'N') AS watermarkYn, COALESCE(request.WATERMARK_DEPLOY_DT_YN, 'N') AS watermarkDeployDtYn, request.REQUEST_PURPOSE, detail.REQUEST_DESC FROM DOCS_REQUEST request INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL detail ON request.REQUEST_NO = detail.REQUEST_NO AND detail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL approvalInfo ON request.REQUEST_NO = approvalInfo.REQUEST_NO AND approvalInfo.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' WHERE request.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT mapping.OBJECT_ID, mapping.OBJECT_NO, mapping.OBJECT_NM, mapping.BUSINESS_AREA_CD, mapping.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, mapping.REV_NO, mapping.PRODUCT_CD AS productNo, COALESCE(mapping.PRODUCT_CD, '') AS productNm, mapping.FILE_NM, mapping.APPLY_HOGI_NO, mapping.OBJECT_CLASS_CD2, mapping.OBJECT_CLASS_NM2, info.DEPLOY_COUNT, info.DESTROY_COUNT, mapping.TOTAL_PAGE_NO AS totalPageCnt FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping INNER JOIN ( SELECT REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DEPLOY_COUNT, DESTROY_COUNT FROM DOCS_DEPLOY_INFO GROUP BY REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DESTROY_COUNT, DEPLOY_COUNT ) info ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = info.REQUEST_NO AND mapping.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} ORDER BY OBJECT_NM ASC

SELECT detail.*, (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_CD = detail.actualUserDeptCd) AS actualUserDeptNm FROM ( SELECT PROCESS_SEQ, APPROVAL_STATUS_CD, ORIGINAL_USER_CD, ACTUAL_USER_CD, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS actualUserNm, (SELECT DEPT_CD FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS actualUserDeptCd, REQUEST_DESC, APPROVAL_GRADE_CD, ACTION_DT, ACTION_CD FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} ) detail

SELECT deploy.REQUEST_NO, deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD) AS deployUserNm, FN_GET_USER_FULL_NM(deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD) AS deployUserFullNm, deploy.DEPLOY_USER_EMAIL, deploy.ACCEPT_YN, deploy.DEPLOY_DESC, deploy.DEPLOY_DT, deploy.DEPLOY_TARGET, deploy.DEPLOY_RESULT, deploy.DESTROY_INFO, deploy.ACCEPT_DT, deploy.DEPLOY_EMAIL_CC FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY deploy WHERE deploy.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT info.REQUEST_NO, info.OBJECT_ID, info.DEPLOY_COUNT, info.DESTROY_COUNT, mapping.OBJECT_NM, mapping.OBJECT_NO, mapping.REV_NO, mapping.TOTAL_PAGE_NO AS totalPageCnt, mapping.PRODUCT_CD AS productNo, COALESCE(mapping.PRODUCT_CD, '') AS productNm FROM ( SELECT REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DEPLOY_COUNT, DESTROY_COUNT, DEPLOY_USER_CD FROM DOCS_DEPLOY_INFO GROUP BY REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DEPLOY_COUNT, DESTROY_COUNT, DEPLOY_USER_CD ) info INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping ON info.REQUEST_NO = mapping.REQUEST_NO AND info.OBJECT_ID = mapping.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY deploy ON info.REQUEST_NO = deploy.REQUEST_NO AND info.DEPLOY_USER_CD = deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD WHERE info.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND info.DEPLOY_USER_CD = #{deployUserCd} ORDER BY OBJECT_NM ASC
